title: The Greenworks 80V Trimmer and Edger Combo powers through overgrowth and delivers sharp, professional lines every time. ✅️ 16 inch cutting path ✅️ Brushless motor = more torque, less noise ✅️LOAD N’ GO™ line reloading ✅️ 45 min runtime + fast recharge ✅️ Lightweight, but works like a beast Power, precision, and performance—without the maintenance. Looking to make the switch from gas to battery? Click the link in my bio. There is a special offer for you. This post contains affiliate links. I may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you. #GreenworksPartner #GreenWorks #BatteryPower
speech_summary: This is Greenworks 80 volt 16 inch cordless battery string trimmer. No gas, no noise, no fuse. Now that's how you clear a yard. Boom. Trimmer off, edge it on, back to work. Who doesn't love crispy edges? Now I'm just showing off. Ran 45 minutes on a single charge and this edge was worth every second. Dirty tools, clean results and I didn't even smell like gas afterwards. Shop the full 80 volt line up at greenworks tools. Com.
